title: calamagrostis × microtis
intro: Calamagrostis × microtis, also known as meadow fescue, is a hybrid of two grass species that has been used for various purposes. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Calamagrostis × microtis include potential uses in reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, allowing for a convenient and natural way to harness its medicinal properties.
